title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. kerneri
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. kerneri, also known as Kerner's kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Kerner's kidney vetch include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to improve kidney function and relieve water retention. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves are used to make medicinal extracts.
